corrections.text: The article states 'Consumer-grade wearable devices that measure sleep, such as smartwatches and EEG headbands, have not yet been validated to produce the signal quality required for brain age estimation, according to [SciTechDaily].' The cited SciTechDaily source does not contain this claim; it only notes that wearable devices 'could eventually be used outside clinical settings.' The specific assertion about validation status and signal quality is not supported by any cited source.
